about.title: About us
about.whoWeAreDesc: Apple Store Vietnam is an authorized Apple reseller in Vietnam, offering the full range of Apple products including iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, AirPods and genuine accessories.
about.missionDesc: We are committed to delivering the best shopping experience for Apple users in Vietnam — from product consultation, fast delivery, to dedicated after-sales service.

values.0: 100% genuine products with full VAT invoice
values.1: Warranty according to official Apple standards
values.2: Professional consulting team with deep product knowledge

about.address: Address: 123 Nguyen Hue, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We are always ready to help. Reach us through the channels below or leave a message — we will respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Sent successfully! We will get back to you shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Apple Store Vietnam is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information when using our services.
privacy.updated: Last updated: 01/01/2024. If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact privacy@applestore.vn.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.0: Personal information: full name, email, phone number, shipping address
collect.1: Payment information: encrypted and processed through secure payment gateways
collect.2: Device information: device type, browser, IP address

usage.title: How we use information
usage.0: Process orders and deliver to your address
usage.3: Improve shopping experience and optimize services

security.title: Information security
security.0: All data is encrypted with 256-bit SSL/TLS
security.1: Payment information is not stored on our systems
security.2: Only authorized personnel can access customer data

sharing.title: Information sharing
sharing.0: We do not sell personal information to third parties
sharing.1: Information is only shared with shipping partners for delivery
sharing.2: May be provided to government authorities upon legal request

rights.title: Your rights
rights.0: Request to view, edit or delete personal information
rights.1: Opt out of marketing emails at any time
rights.2: Request us to stop processing your data
rights.3: Contact: privacy@applestore.vn to exercise the above rights

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: Please read these terms of use carefully before using Apple Store Vietnam services. These terms are effective from 01/01/2024.
terms.updated: Last updated: 01/01/2024. For any questions, please contact legal@applestore.vn.

s1.title: 1. General terms
s1.0: By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with the terms of use set forth below.
s1.1: We reserve the right to change, modify or update these terms at any time without prior notice.
s1.2: Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s2.title: 2. User accounts
s2.0: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.
s2.1: Do not share your account with others.
s2.2: Notify us immediately if you suspect your account has been compromised.
s2.3: We reserve the right to suspend accounts if fraud or policy violations are detected.

s3.title: 3. Orders and payments
s3.0: Orders are only confirmed after successful payment.
s3.1: Product prices may change without prior notice.
s3.2: We reserve the right to cancel orders if fraud or system errors are detected.
s3.3: All transactions are recorded and can be retrieved when necessary.

s4.title: 4. Intellectual property
s4.0: All content on the website is owned by Apple Store Vietnam.
s4.1: Do not copy, distribute or use content without consent.
s4.2: Apple logo and brand names are the property of Apple Inc.

s5.title: 5. Limitation of liability
s5.0: We are not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of our services.
s5.1: We do not guarantee that the website will always operate continuously, error-free or virus-free.
s5.2: Our maximum liability shall not exceed the value of your order.

s6.title: 6. Governing law
s6.0: These terms are governed by the laws of Vietnam.
s6.1: Any disputes shall be resolved at the competent court in Ho Chi Minh City.

warranty.title: Warranty policy
warranty.updated: Last updated: 01/01/2024. Policy may change without prior notice. Please contact our hotline for more details.

duration.title: Warranty period
duration.0: iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch: 12 months at authorized Apple service centers
duration.2: Third-party accessories: according to manufacturer policy

conditions.title: Warranty conditions
conditions.0: Product is within the warranty period
conditions.1: Product is defective due to manufacturer fault, not external impact
conditions.2: Valid purchase invoice from Apple Store Vietnam
conditions.3: Warranty seal is intact, no signs of tampering

exclusions.title: Warranty exclusions
exclusions.0: Damage from impact, drops, or water exposure
exclusions.1: Damage from unauthorized repair or hardware modifications
exclusions.2: Damage from misuse or not following instructions
exclusions.3: Normal wear and tear over time

process.title: Warranty process
process.0: Step 1: Contact hotline 1800 1234 or visit the store directly
process.1: Step 2: Staff inspects and confirms product defect
process.2: Step 3: Device sent to authorized Apple service center
process.3: Step 4: Receive device after repair (typically 3–7 working days)

returnPolicy.title: Return policy
returnPolicy.updated: Last updated: 01/01/2024. For any questions, please contact hotline 1800 1234 or email support@applestore.vn.

conditions.title: Return conditions
conditions.0: Product is within 7 days from purchase date
conditions.1: Product is intact, unused or defective due to manufacturer
conditions.2: Complete with invoice, accessories and original packaging
conditions.3: Warranty seal intact, not torn or erased

eligible.title: Eligible return cases
eligible.0: Product has technical defects from manufacturer upon receipt
eligible.1: Product does not match the ordered model, color or configuration

ineligible.title: Non-returnable cases
ineligible.1: Product damaged due to user error
ineligible.2: Product has been activated and used normally

process.title: Return process
process.0: Step 1: Contact hotline 1800 1234 or email support@applestore.vn within 7 days
process.1: Step 2: Provide order information and describe product issue
process.2: Step 3: Send product back to store as instructed
process.3: Step 4: Receive replacement or refund within 3–5 working days

refund.title: Refund policy
refund.0: 100% refund if defect is from manufacturer or wrong item delivered
refund.1: Refund time: 3–5 working days for online payments
refund.2: Cash refund on the same working day at the store

appleCare.title: AppleCare repair service
appleCare.accessoriesNote: Note: Products displayed at AppleCare. Please visit and purchase directly with many attractive promotions.
appleCare.centerDesc: At AppleCare Service Center, customers who love the Apple ecosystem will experience the most comprehensive and diverse range of genuine Apple warranty services from iPhone, iPad to AirPods... in a sophisticated and modern space.

authentic.title: Genuine Apple
authentic.desc: AppleCare is an authorized Apple service center. All repair components at AppleCare are supplied directly by Apple.

certified.title: Apple Certified
certified.desc: 100% of AppleCare specialists and technicians are trained and certified by Apple.

secure.title: Absolute security
secure.desc: Customer information is strictly protected under the highest control standards.

premium.title: Premium service
premium.desc: With a customer-centric approach, AppleCare is committed to delivering superior service quality to customers.

saving.title: Cost saving
saving.desc: AppleCare frequently offers promotional programs to help customers save more on product repairs.

iphone.name: iPhone repair
iphone.desc: Apple repair center for iPhone screen, iPhone back glass, iPhone battery

macbook.name: MacBook repair
macbook.desc: MacBook Logic Board, MacBook Battery, MacBook Screen
